phase_name: Signal space, geometry, line constraint, Schur gap, papers shipped

completed_tasks.name: Signal space: 15-dim was truncation artifact. Margin converges. 73 near-zero converged.
Geometry: Loewner inertia, CND, Bezoutian, interlacing -- all 4 killed.
Line constraint: dh/d(sigma)=0, h_pair minimized, dual test functions, tube delta~0.01.
KNIFE-EDGE: Lorentzian only at exact Gamma diagonal. -log(n) unique.
Phase transition mapped. 0/2200 arithmetic. Turan independent. Schur gap ~4 (not 1e-7).
Closed-form entries. 2x2 det formula (gap was wrong decomposition, actual det=0.0014).
RIGOROUS interval verification: 134 points, ALL PASS, lam^2=5 to 300000.
Dense verification: 134 points, max spacing 0.18 (need <0.72). 4x safety factor.
Kato analyticity confirmed: eigenvalue simple (gap 1.5-2.4x, growing).
Holtz paper v4 (5pp) and main paper v9 (13pp) finalized, compiled, pushed.
3-agent literature deep dive: no existing theorem covers our matrix. Genuinely new territory.

remaining_tasks.name: Prove exponential decay eig_max ~ exp(-0.057L) analytically (closes proof for all L)
Email sent to holtz@math.berkeley.edu. Await response.
User has a different direction for next session.

next_action: User directing next session to a different hunt. RH arc paused at: papers shipped, 134-point rigorous verification complete, asymptotic bound open, Holtz email pending.
context_notes: 237 commits. 80 sessions. Papers: cauchy_matrix_conjecture.pdf (Holtz, 5pp, v4) and lorentzian_weil_conjecture.pdf (main, 13pp, v9). Both cite Connes-Consani 2021 properly, acknowledge known equivalences, list novel contributions honestly. Interval verification covers lam^2=5 to 300000. Kato analyticity confirmed but monotonicity killed. Literature exhaustively searched (3 agents): BFJ, Bhatia-Sano, Pushnitski-Treil all close but insufficient. Experts identified: Holtz (primary), Pushnitski, Bharali, Bhatia, Treil.
